# BuyUnrepped

> BuyUnrepped is a Tennessee-based licensed real estate brokerage that helps home buyers purchase property without traditional full-service agent representation. We offer flat-fee pricing (a $995 Offer Package, plus an optional $2,495 Transaction Management tier) with structured, non-representational support — saving buyers thousands in commission costs.

BuyUnrepped does not act as the buyer's agent or enter into a buyer agency relationship. Instead, we provide tools, templates, and licensed expert access so buyers can navigate the home purchase process independently.

## Pages

- [About](https://www.buyunrepped.com/about): Our story, founder Kayla Brown, and mission to make home buying more affordable in Tennessee
- [Pricing](https://www.buyunrepped.com/pricing): Two flat-fee tiers — the $995 Offer Package and the $2,495 Transaction Management — with feature comparison
- [Savings Calculator](https://www.buyunrepped.com/savings): Interactive calculator showing how much buyers save vs. traditional agent commissions
- [Contact](https://www.buyunrepped.com/contact): Get in touch — email info@buyunrepped.com or visit our Nashville office

## Resources

- [Before You Click "Contact Agent" on Zillow: 3 Things Buyers Should Know](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/before-you-click-contact-agent-zillow): What the Contact Agent button actually does, when touring comes with a written agreement, and what unrepresented buyers should do instead
- [How Much Should You Offer on a House in Tennessee?](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/how-much-to-offer-house-tennessee): Why there's no formula for how far below asking to offer, and how CMAs, terms, appraisals and emotion should shape your number
- [How to Set Up a Home Search Without an Agent](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/how-to-set-up-home-search-without-agent): How to build buffered filters and a multi-site routine across Redfin, Zillow, FSBO and pre-market channels so you don't miss the right house
- [10 Times BuyUnrepped May Make More Sense Than a Traditional Buyer's Agent](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/when-buyunrepped-makes-more-sense): Ten situations where a flat-fee, non-representation model fits better than traditional buyer representation
- [5 Benefits of Contacting the Listing Agent Directly When Buying Unrepresented](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/contacting-listing-agent-directly-benefits): Why direct contact with the listing agent can mean faster answers, simpler scheduling and more credibility as an unrepresented buyer
- [3 Built-In Protections in the Tennessee REALTORS® Purchase and Sale Agreement](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/tennessee-purchase-agreement-protections): How the inspection, financing, and appraisal provisions protect buyers who follow the deadlines
- [Earnest Money in Tennessee: What It Is, Where It Goes and When You Can Get It Back](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/earnest-money-tennessee): How earnest money works, when it's refundable, and what happens when the parties disagree
- [7 Things to Know Before You Submit a Repair Request](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/before-you-submit-repair-request): How to separate real problems from imperfections, get quotes, and build a repair request that focuses on what matters
- [Should You Let a Seller Stay After Closing?](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/seller-stay-after-closing): When temporary seller occupancy after closing is a useful tool versus an uninsured headache, and what the written agreement must cover
- [How BuyUnrepped Actually Works on a Real Tennessee Offer](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/how-buyunrepped-works-real-tennessee-offer): A screen-by-screen walkthrough of a typical Tennessee resale deal, from showing request to closing, and who handles what
- [Why BuyUnrepped Exists](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/why-buyunrepped-exists): Why buyers deserve a third option between a traditional agent and going it alone, from the founder's own home search
- [Do You Want the House, or Do You Want to Win?](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/house-or-win): Why the negotiating instincts that work in business can backfire when buying a home, and when not to negotiate
- [What Makes a Strong Offer Besides Price?](https://www.buyunrepped.com/resources/strong-offer-besides-price): How down payment, lender choice, clean terms, earnest money and solving the seller's problems can beat a bigger number

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.buyunrepped.com/privacy): How we collect, use, and protect your data
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.buyunrepped.com/terms): Terms of use for BuyUnrepped services
